session_meta.directive_received: Run autonomously toward GPT-2-level output by fixing attention; user AFK; use best judgment; no gradient descent
session_meta.how_to_resume: Read documentation/ and this project_summary.json; focus on LLM/components/attention/ and LLM/generate_rerank.py

core_principles.no_gradients: Pure gradient-free evolution only. No backprop. No hybrid.
core_principles.energy_mandatory: Every GENREG model needs an energy homeostasis system.
core_principles.no_long_runs: Cap iterations ~2-3K gens. Make changes fast.
core_principles.no_scaling_shortcut: Don't scale arch to fix plateaus; apply landscape pressure instead.
core_principles.verify_before_celebrating: Check majority baseline + held-out split + inspect actual outputs.

BIG_WIN_SESSION_2026_04_18.headline: Discovered the RERANK approach as a major generation improvement. Previous pipelines produced function-word soup or fragments. Rerank (n-gram proposes candidates, attention cosine scores them) gives MULTI-CLAUSE COHERENT ENGLISH.

BIG_WIN_SESSION_2026_04_18.why_it_works: The ridge head was the bottleneck because its flat softmax (std~0.003) makes sampling uniform-over-top-K. Rerank SKIPS RIDGE ENTIRELY — takes n-gram cascade grammatical candidates and scores them by cosine(attn_out, candidate_emb). N-gram provides grammar, attention provides semantic bias, ridge's flat distribution never enters the picture.

CRITICAL_DISCOVERY_ridge_mismatch.title: Ridge/Causal attention mismatch
CRITICAL_DISCOVERY_ridge_mismatch.what: predhead_wiki_causal.pkl was actually fit on BIDIRECTIONAL attention features. On CAUSAL features (what generation uses), it gets 8% t1.

experiments_chronology_2026_04_18.result: Evolution found alpha=0 (no attention) — trivial solution

pipeline_state.flow: tokens -> [Tokenizer] -> [Embedding] -> [PosEnc] -> [CausalAttn stack] -> RERANK(n-gram candidates, attn_cosine) -> text
pipeline_state.previous_best_method: Pure n-gram cascade — now superseded by rerank

key_technical_findings.ridge_softmax_physics: W_head std ~4e-4, logit std ~0.003, softmax uniform over top-K. Sampling is candidate-set biased not frequency biased.
key_technical_findings.why_attention_alone_couldnt_fix_it: Attention is 768→768; ridge broadcasts to V=51641. Ridge's tiny magnitudes are fixed. No attention tweak rescales ridge.
key_technical_findings.rerank_insight: Skip ridge entirely. N-gram provides K grammatical candidates (varying per position — inhaackable). Attention picks semantic winner via cosine to candidate embeddings.
key_technical_findings.goodhart_pattern_four_times: N-gram rollout (rare loop), vbias (common boost), top-K recall (frequency hack), cosine-emb (alpha=0). Any scalar fitness optimized by evolution gets cheated unless anchored to position-varying ground truth.

memory_updates_to_add: project_ridge_causal_mismatch — shipped predhead was fit on BIDIR not causal
feedback_goodhart_every_proxy — every scalar proxy was hackable
project_rerank_breakthrough — RERANK approach with existing CE attn + n-gram candidates produces multi-clause coherent English
